title: No Nether Fog
description: No Nether Fog with the press of a single hotkey!
body:
# No Nether Fog Mod

A simple Minecraft Fabric mod for version 1.16.1 that allows you to toggle nether fog on and off with a configurable hotkey.

## Features

- Toggle nether fog visibility with a single keypress
- Configurable hotkey (default: F key)
- Client-side only mod
- Works in Minecraft 1.16.1 with Fabric

## Installation

1. Install Fabric Loader for Minecraft 1.16.1
2. Install Fabric API
3. Place the compiled mod JAR in your mods folder

## Usage

- Press F (or your configured key) while in the Nether to toggle fog visibility
- The hotkey can be configured in Minecraft's Controls settings under "No Nether Fog" category
